runners.formComment: Hit the frame latest (25.63) when second at this track in a Grade 5. Has performed well off the draw with a win and two places from four starts. Has ability and should feature.

runners.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and tends to spot them a start in her races, The latest effort was a 4.5 lengths fourth over 390m at this track. Others make more appeal.

runners.formComment: Placed last time (23.60) at Horsham in a Grade 5, finishing second and beaten 6 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and two places from eight starts. Others rate better this time.

runners.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 390m. Last start finished 2nd over 390m at this track beaten one length (22.50) behind Belgium Slice in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on April 4. Has clocked a slick 22.21 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.

runners.formComment: Back from a nine weeks spell and last resumed over 450m at this track where he was in the placings, finishing second. Racing well and has to be included.
